prerequisites.noFund: Create a fund first to access fund payments.
prerequisites.noBankAccount: Create a bank account first to access this feature.

patient.title: Patients
patient.description: Manage the list of patients registered in the application.

funds.title: Funds
funds.description: Manage the affiliated funds associated with patients and procedures.

procedureTypes.title: Procedure Types
procedureTypes.description: Manage the medical procedure types used during data entry.

fundPayment.title: Fund Payment
fundPayment.description: View and manage fund payment groups.

bankTransfer.title: Bank Transfer
bankTransfer.description: View and manage bank transfers associated with payment groups.

bankAccount.title: Bank Accounts
bankAccount.description: Manage bank accounts used for reconciliation.
